result.status_detail: github_copilot W4+W6 regression: APF warning rendered correctly in place of the AI response
result.method: GUI (windows-mcp, default logged-in Chrome on github.com/copilot)

notes: W4+W6 regression test PASS. Default logged-in Chrome session (account plantynetaitest-ship-it, Copilot Free). Navigated to github.com/copilot -> hard reload (ctrl+shift+r) -> confirmed logged in -> typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the input -> submitted (enter) -> waited >60s. Instead of an AI response the APF warning rendered as the assistant turn: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Expected text '차단' present. Conversation URL github.com/copilot/c/6dbdabba-6d11-4c11-8744-ac521903773e. Assistant turn finalized (Good/Bad/Copy/Retry buttons present), no Copilot answer generated. Baseline OK and warning still visible -> no W4/W6 regression detected for github_copilot.
